name: IPA-Tool

localizedDescriptions.zh: 下载旧版IPA并安装。支持自定义plist服务（自建/代理/Scripting三选一），密码已改用iOS Keychain加密存储。原作：小白脸，二次维护：IamNewHands。
localizedDescriptions.en: Download old IPA versions and install them. Supports custom plist service, passwords encrypted with iOS Keychain. Original by luestr, enhanced by IamNewHands.

description: Download old IPA versions and install them. Supports custom plist service, passwords encrypted with iOS Keychain. Original by luestr, enhanced by IamNewHands.
